Permit limit = max requests per window. Global partition: one limit shared by all users. User partition: each user (or IP for anonymous) gets their own independent limit bucket. Queue limit > 0 allows requests to queue instead of immediate rejection.

Requests that can queue when limit is hi: Requests that can queue when limit is hit. 0 = reject immediately (recommended). Range: 0-100.

Template sent as the user message. Conta: Template sent as the user message. Contains the actual content and context for the AI.
Template sent as the user message. Varia: Template sent as the user message. Variables like {{X}} are substituted at runtime.
The key is stored encrypted in the datab: This is the API Secret Key provided by your AI service (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic) used to authenticate requests. For security reasons, this key will be encrypted before it is securely saved in the database. Never share this key or display it publicly.
This AI model specifically evaluates user inputs for potential policy violations, toxicity, hate speech, and spam. It runs behind the scenes before storing data. Usually, smaller and faster models are preferred here to minimize latency and optimize costs for high-frequency safety checks.
The model used for text generation tasks: This is the primary AI model used for generating text across the application. It handles tasks like summarizing content, drafting ideas, and answering queries. Select a capable model like GPT-4 or Claude 3.5 Sonnet for complex reasoning, or a faster model like GPT-3.5 or Haiku for simpler, high-volume tasks.
The system prompt sets the AI's behavior: The system prompt sets the AI's behavior and role. It runs before every user message. Use
The user prompt is the actual content se: The user prompt is the actual content sent to the AI after the system prompt. Use it to provide context, data, and specific instructions for each request. Placeholders like

The user prompt is the actual content sent to the AI. Use placeholders like {{X}} or {{Y}} for dynamic values. Workspace admins can only edit user prompts - system prompts are managed by platform admins.
This name determines which provider impl: This name specifies the internal integration code used to communicate with the AI provider's API. For example, selecting 'OpenAI' ensures the system uses the correct API endpoints and format for ChatGPT models. Choose the exact provider name that matches the API key and models you intend to use.
Time window over which the permit limit: Time window over which the permit limit is enforced. Range: 1-3600 (1 hour).
